_meta.description: Kernel parameter bindings for data-driven codegen

binding_types: weight:<field_name> - Weight from L-><field> or L_HEADER.<field>
weight_f:<field_name> - Weight as float* (for fp32 weights like gamma)
runtime:<expr_name> - Runtime expression (kv_k, kv_v, rope_cos, rope_sin, pos)

mega_fused_attention_prefill.note: Signature: output, input, residual, ln1_gamma, wq, bq, wq_dt, wk, bk, wk_dt, wv, bv, wv_dt, wo, bo, wo_dt, kv_k, kv_v, rope_cos, rope_sin, start_pos, tokens, cache_capacity, embed_dim, aligned_embed_dim, num_heads, num_kv_heads, head_dim, aligned_head_dim, eps, scratch

rmsnorm_forward.note: gamma source is determined by which weight is present (pre/post norms and final norm)

qk_norm_forward.note: Per-head RMSNorm on Q and K. Wraps rmsnorm_forward twice (Q then K). In-place on scratch buffers.

gated_deltanet_autoregressive_forward.note: Single-token Gated DeltaNet recurrent update used by qwen3next/Qwen3.5 linear attention.

recurrent_split_qkv_forward.note: Split packed recurrent QKV rows into explicit Q, K, and V outputs.

split_q_gate_forward.note: Split packed full-attention Q+gate rows into query rows and gate rows.

recurrent_split_qkv_backward.note: Backward pass for the packed recurrent QKV split.

recurrent_dt_gate_forward.note: Apply softplus(alpha + dt_bias) * a row-wise for the recurrent DeltaNet gate.

recurrent_dt_gate_backward.note: Backward pass for the recurrent dt gate transform.

recurrent_conv_state_update_forward.note: Build the recurrent convolution input window from cached history plus current Q/K/V rows.

recurrent_conv_state_update_backward.note: Backward pass for recurrent convolution state window construction.

recurrent_silu_forward.note: Apply SiLU elementwise to the recurrent convolution output rows.

recurrent_split_conv_qkv_forward.note: Split post-convolution recurrent packed QKV rows into explicit Q, K, and V outputs.

recurrent_split_conv_qkv_backward.note: Backward pass for the post-convolution recurrent QKV split.

recurrent_qk_l2_norm_forward.note: Apply per-head L2 normalization to recurrent Q and K rows in-place before DeltaNet.

recurrent_norm_gate_forward.note: Apply per-head RMSNorm and SiLU(z) gating to recurrent outputs.

attn_gate_sigmoid_mul_forward.note: Multiply attention output rows by sigmoid(gate) before the qwen3.5 output projection.

ssm_conv1d_forward.note: Qwen3.5/qwen3next SSM causal depthwise convolution before the recurrent DeltaNet update.

ssm_conv1d_backward.note: Backward pass for the qwen3next/Qwen3.5 SSM causal depthwise convolution.

qk_norm_backward_f32.note: v7 training backward for Q/K per-head RMSNorm.

rope_forward_qk.note: RoPE is typically in-place: input q,k are modified and returned as output q,k

kv_cache_store.note: Store K,V to KV cache at current position after RoPE

attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_.note: Prefill: all tokens process together with causal mask

attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_fl.note: Prefill: full / bidirectional attention across the entire sequence

attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_.note: Prefill: Llama-parity flash attention with K/V rounded through FP16

attention_forward_decode_head_major_gqa_.note: Decode: single query token attends to KV cache (positions 0..pos)
Decode: Llama-parity flash attention with K/V rounded through FP16
Decode: single query token attends to KV cache (regular O(n) path)

attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_.note: Prefill: sliding window attention with causal mask

attention_forward_decode_head_major_gqa_.note: Decode: sliding window attention - single query token attends to last W KV cache entries

geglu_forward_fp32.note: GeGLU: out = GELU(a) * b where x = [a, b] along last dim

geglu_forward_bf16.note: BF16 GeGLU: converts to FP32, computes, converts back

ck_qkv_project_head_major_quant.note: Prefill: head-major QKV projection into KV cache

ck_residual_add_token_major.note: a is current output (outproj/mlp_down), b is saved residual

kv_cache_batch_copy.notes: Emit two memcpy calls: K and V cache batch copy in prefill mode.

memmove.notes: Memory move for overlapping buffers. Used for copy_last_logits in prefill mode.

transpose_inplace.notes: No-op: prefill codegen generates its own transpose loops

gemv_q5_0_q8_0.notes: _first_weight is determined from weights dict, _output_dim/_input_dim from weight shape

gemv_q5_0.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemv_q4_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemv_q6_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemv_q5_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed. Q5_K: 5-bit super-block quant with nested scales.

gemv_q5_1.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed. Q5_1 uses minimum value (m) for better precision.

gemv_q5_1_q8_1.notes: Q5_1 with internal FP32->Q8_1 activation contract.

gemv_q8_0_q8_0_parallel_omp.notes: OpenMP-parallel variant — same signature as gemv_q8_0_q8_0

gemv_q5_0_q8_0_parallel_omp.notes: OpenMP-parallel variant — same signature as gemv_q5_0_q8_0

gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_parallel_omp.notes: OpenMP-parallel variant — same signature as gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_dispatch

gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_dispatch.notes: Fused quantize + GEMV (Q5_0 weights) + bias add. FP32 input, quantized internally.

gemv_fused_q8_0_bias_dispatch.notes: Fused quantize + GEMV (Q8_0 weights) + bias add. FP32 input, quantized internally.

gemm_nt_q5_0.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemm_nt_q4_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemm_nt_q6_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemm_nt_q5_k.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed. Q5_K: 5-bit super-block quant with nested scales.

gemm_nt_q5_1.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed. Q5_1 uses minimum value (m) for better precision.

gemm_nt_q5_1_q8_1.notes: Q5_1 with internal FP32->Q8_1 activation contract.

gemm_nt_q8_0.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemm_nt_q8_0_q8_0_contract.notes: Q8_0 contract path with internal activation quantization.

gemm_nt_q5_0_q8_0.notes: Q8_0 activation version - requires quantize_row_q8_0 before call

gemm_nt_q6_k_q8_k.notes: Q8_K activation version - requires quantize_row_q8_k before call

gemm_nt_q8_0_q8_0.notes: Q8_0 activation version for weight Q8_0

gemm_nt_q4_k_q8_k.notes: Q8_K activation version for weight Q4_K

gemv_q8_0.notes: FP32 activation version - no quantization needed

gemv_q8_0_q8_0_contract.notes: Q8_0 contract path with internal activation quantization.

gemv_q4_0.notes: FP32 activation with Q4_0 weight - no quantization needed

gemm_nt_q4_0.notes: FP32 activation with Q4_0 weight - no quantization needed

dense_embedding_lookup.notes: Token embedding lookup - fp16 weights dequantized to fp32 at load time

quantize_row_q8_0.notes: Quantize FP32 activation to Q8_0 format. Output buffer must be sized for Q8_0 blocks.

quantize_row_q8_k.notes: Quantize FP32 activation to Q8_K format. Output buffer must be sized for Q8_K blocks.

logits_copy_to_position.notes: Copy logits from scratch to position-indexed location. Used in decode mode.

rope_precompute_cache.notes: Precompute RoPE cos/sin cache. Called ONCE at model init with rope_theta from config. Different models use different theta: Llama2=10000, Llama3=500000, Qwen2=1000000.

rope_forward_qk_with_rotary_dim.note: RoPE is typically in-place: input q,k are modified and returned as output q,k

rope_forward_qk_pairwise.note: Pairwise RoPE for Llama-family layouts; input q,k are rotated in-place

rope_forward_qk_pairwise_with_rotary_dim.note: Pairwise RoPE for Llama-family layouts; input q,k are rotated in-place

rope_precompute_cache_split.note: Legacy split-cache RoPE init (head_dim/2 cache layout)

gemm_backward_f32.note: v7 training backward: generic linear/matmul backward

residual_add_backward_f32.note: v7 training backward: residual split gradient

rope_backward_qk_f32.note: v7 training backward: inverse RoPE for q/k

rope_backward_qk_pairwise_f32.note: v7 training backward: inverse pairwise RoPE for q/k

embedding_backward_f32.note: v7 training backward: embedding table scatter-add

swiglu_backward_exact.note: v7 training backward: exact swiglu gradient

attention_backward_causal_head_major_gqa.note: v7 training attention backward reference path

gradient_clip_norm_f32.note: v7 gradient clipping by global norm
